title: DAY CENTER - 211info
text: PDX SAINTS LOVE DAY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a day center for sheltering, hot meals, haircuts, clothing, public restrooms, bus passes, wound care, hygiene kits, OHP and SNAP form assistance, ID and birth record replacement and payment assistance, resources for housing navigation and shelter referrals, detox referrals, overdose prevention, and Narcan supplies. Community Health Workers (CHWs), Peer Wellness Specialists (PWS), and Peer Support Specialists (PSS) are available to assist with resources, connections to health care, and case management. 247 SE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Day Center: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm, Thanksgiving and Christmas 9am-noon Hot meals: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm Haircuts: Monday 10am-2pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: ID replacement: Birth certificate if not from Oregon or no previous Oregon ID LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of 82nd Avenue and Ash Street. TriMet bus 72 with a stop at the nearby corner. Services: Bus Fare Community Meals General Clothing Provision Hair and Nail Care Homeless Drop In Centers Housing Related Coordinated Entry Opioid Antidote Distribution Packed Lunches/Dinners Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Restrooms Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Homelessness Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PDX SAINTS LOVE
